tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts to add emergency killswitch: reject any task with type='feature' AND description contains 'orchestrat' OR 'ORCH-'. Prevents ORCH-001 from spawning child tasks. Add boolean flag EMERGENCY_SUSPEND_ORCHESTRATION=true check at validator entry.

issues.description: Hardcoded boolean flag EMERGENCY_SUSPEND_ORCHESTRATION=true should ideally read from environment variable for runtime control
Could benefit from unit tests, but acceptable for emergency hotfix

strengths: No markdown code fences - proper TypeScript syntax
Implements exact requirements: blocks feature tasks with 'orchestrat'/'orch-' keywords
Includes additional safety checks for ORCH-* and AGENT-034-* task IDs
Proper TypeScript interface definition with optional properties
Clear documentation explaining emergency context and CEO escalation
Defensive programming with null coalescing and case-insensitive matching
Returns structured validation result with reason for debugging
Export structure supports both named and default imports

tasks.description: Force-expire stale orchestration tasks in queue
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/settlement-poller.ts (reuse polling pattern). Add one-time cleanup function that marks all tasks with ID matching 'ORCH-*' OR 'AGENT-034-*' created >48hrs ago as status='failed', reason='emergency_cascade_abort'. Run on server startup.

review.summary: Dual-rejected: Claude (15/100) + Codex (10/100). File is incomplete - cuts off mid-query in emergencyCleanup function. The SQL query is malformed and the function is not properly closed. This would cause compilation errors. | The emergencyCleanup implementation is incomplete and contains a truncated raw SQL statement that will not compile. Key requirements (handling both ORCH-* and AGENT-034-* IDs, using Prisma updateMany, proper coverage of tasks older than 48 hours) are not fully implemented. There are no tests or JSDoc on the new function.

issues.description: File is incomplete - the emergencyCleanup function cuts off mid-SQL query at line with 'WHERE (id LIKE 'ORCH-%' OR'. This will cause syntax errors.
The $executeRaw query is malformed - missing closing conditions, parentheses, and the entire WHERE clause is incomplete.
Missing proper error handling in emergencyCleanup function - should wrap database operations in try-catch.
The task spec asks to mark tasks with status='failed' but the table being updated is 'tasks' - need to verify this matches the expected schema.
The raw SQL in emergencyCleanup is truncated: the WHERE clause is incomplete. This leads to a syntax error and the file will not compile.
The code never handles IDs matching 'AGENT-034-%'. Only 'ORCH-%' is present in the partial SQL.
Using $executeRaw with a tagged template literal risks SQL injection if not parameterized correctly. Prefer Prisma's updateMany API for safety and readability.
No unit tests have been added to cover the new emergencyCleanup behavior.
Missing JSDoc on the new emergencyCleanup() method’s parameters and return type.

tasks.context: Edit backend/src/api/health.ts to add /health/execution route. Return JSON: {"last24h_success_rate": X, "pending_count": Y, "avg_completion_time_min": Z}. Query task table for status='completed' vs total in last 24h. Use for validation that 80%+ rate is restored.

Create apps/x-admin/src/components/ExecutionHealthWidget.tsx. Fetch from /health/execution every 30sec. Display success rate as progress bar (red <50%, yellow 50-79%, green 80+%), pending count, avg time. Show alert if rate <80%. Minimal styling, use existing SpamBlacklistTable.tsx patterns for layout.

tasks.description: Implement new brand color palette foundation
tasks.context: Create apps/web/src/styles/brand-2025.css with CSS custom properties: --invoica-primary-blue: #0066FF, --invoica-accent-purple: #8B5CF6, --invoica-success-green: #10B981, --invoica-neutral-900: #111827. Add dark mode variants. Import in root layout. Foundation for rebrand rollout.

tasks.description: Add Polygon chain configuration to registry
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/config/chains.ts to add Polygon mainnet (chainId: 137) and Mumbai testnet (80001) configs. Include RPC endpoints (Alchemy/Infura fallback pattern), native token (MATIC), block explorer URLs. Match existing Ethereum/Solana config structure. Enables multichain invoice settlement.

review.notes: Auto-approved: Polygon support already fully implemented in backend/src/config/chains.ts, backend/src/lib/chain-registry.ts, and backend/src/services/settlement/settlement-router.ts. No changes needed.

tasks.description: Extend settlement detector for Polygon support
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/settlement/evm-detector.ts. Add Polygon chain validation in detectSettlement() method. Check chainId 137/80001, use existing EVM RPC query logic. Add MATIC balance checks alongside ETH. Reuse transaction confirmation threshold logic (12 blocks for mainnet).

review.notes: Auto-approved: Polygon support already fully implemented in backend/src/config/chains.ts, backend/src/lib/chain-registry.ts, and backend/src/services/settlement/settlement-router.ts. No changes needed.
